ogTitle: Wongan Hills vs Wonnerup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wongan Hills and Wonnerup.
heading: Wongan Hills vs Wonnerup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wongan Hills, Western Australia and Wonnerup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wongan Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Wonnerup (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wongan Hills or Wonnerup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wongan Hills has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Wonnerup scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wongan Hills scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Wonnerup scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wongan Hills or Wonnerup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wongan Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
